description: Configure GeoWebCache tile caching for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer in the GeoServer web admin (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, User: admin, Password: Admin123!). Create a gridset named 'WebMercator512' using EPSG:3857 with 512x512 pixel tile dimensions and at least 5 zoom levels. Assign this gridset to the 'ne:ne_countries' tile layer and ensure 'image/png' is an allowed tile image format.
